speaker: [player]
text: I'm [player]. It's nice to meet you both.

speaker: Vermia
text: OHHH! A composed one! Scatha LOVES composed energy! It means you're spiritually solid. Like good topsoil!

speaker: Grubwin
text: Topsoil isn't a personality trait, Vermia.

speaker: Vermia
text: Everything is a personality trait if you believe hard enough.

speaker: Grubwin
text: That's also not true. Hi, [player]. Welcome. Don't let her assign you a spiritual element on the first day. She will try.

speaker: Vermia
text: I wasn't going to do it on the first day. I was going to wait until the end of the meeting.
Before you can ask what a spiritual element is, or why Vermia is already reaching for a small notebook, the door opens again.
